summary: Replaced fragile JSON fences stripping with robust _extract_json method that handles three cases: pure JSON responses, markdown code fences (```json ... ```), and dialog-wrapped JSON (model returning explanatory text before/after JSON block). The method tries direct parsing first, then regex extraction from code fences, finally falling back to finding first { to last } braces to extract JSON from surrounding text, addressing OpenRouter's tendency to return dialog + JSON despite response_format: json_object.
